channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: World Cup delegation compliant with US Ebola protocols, DR Congo says
item.description: 'The Leopards are ready, they are safe, and the ​US will embrace ⁠this team,' DRC's ambassador to the US says.

item.title: Australia charges alleged ISIL-linked woman after return from Syria
item.description: Case follows repatriation of women and children held for years in Syrian camps without trial.

item.title: Iran and US trade attacks after Trump rejects report of Hormuz agreement
item.description: IRGC says it targeted a base used by US forces after US attacks on site near Bandar Abbas.

item.title: What’s happening on Iran war day 90 as US launches new strikes
item.description: The US strikes near Bandar Abbas as tensions rise in the Strait of Hormuz; Iran reports no casualties or damage.

item.title: Morocco tops Africa’s industrialisation index for first time
item.description: North Africa leads Africa’s industrialisation, but continent-wide gains remain slow and uneven.

item.title: Palestinian graduates in the West Bank enter a collapsed job market
item.description: Youth joblessness among West Bank graduates has nearly hit 40 percent. Many wonder what the degrees are worth.

item.title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi hailed as a once-in-a-lifetime talent after IPL blitz
item.description: Cricket greats, writers and broadcasters hail 15-year-old Rajasthan Royals opener after his 29-ball 97 in IPL playoffs.

item.title: Ebola outbreak: What travel restrictions have countries imposed?
item.description: Some countries ban arrivals from affected countries while others step up screening in bid to contain rare strain.

item.title: Ghana welcomes home citizens evacuated from South Africa
item.description: The first flight carrying around 300 Ghanaians evacuated from South Africa following anti-immigrant tensions.

item.title: Google employee charged with insider trading over Polymarket bets
item.description: Michele Spagnuolo allegedly used insider information to profit from bets on people on Google's most-searched list.

item.title: Aid cuts and climate change drive deadly malaria surge in Zimbabwe
item.description: A surge in malaria cases in Zimbabwe is exposing fragile health systems and growing treatment shortages in rural areas.

item.title: Parisians defy swimming ban to cool off as record heat hits Europe
item.description: Parisians cooled off in the city’s Saint-Martin canal as an unprecedented heatwave pushed temperatures across Europe.

item.title: Uganda closes border with DRC in an effort to contain Ebola outbreak
item.description: Uganda has closed its border with neighbouring DR Congo for four weeks in an effort to contain an Ebola outbreak.

item.title: US returns Palestinian rights expert Francesca Albanese to sanctions list
item.description: Trump administration has sought to pressure international officials who scrutinise reported abuses by Israeli forces.

item.title: Iran war live: US strikes Iranian site; Kuwait targeted by missiles, drones
item.description: Kuwait's military says air defences are battling 'hostile' missiles and drones, as alarms sound across the country.

item.title: Jill Biden worried husband Joe was ‘having a stroke’ during 2024 US debate
item.description: The former US first lady said she had never seen former President Joe Biden act the way he did on the 2024 debate stage.

item.title: Bolivia’s president warns ‘time is running out’ amid protest crisis
item.description: Bolivia’s president has warned protesters “time is running out” amid a weeks-long standoff.

item.title: Markets rally amid hopes of US-Iran deal
item.description: Markets betting a deal will reopen the Strait of Hormuz and soothe the deep global economic uncertainty.

item.title: Former assistant to TV star Matthew Perry sentenced to 41 months in prison
item.description: Sentencing of Kenneth Iwamasa concludes prosecution of five people in connection with Perry's death from drug ketamine.

item.title: Why is Israel ramping up attacks in Lebanon despite a ceasefire?
item.description: Intensification comes while US-Iran indirect talks continue.

item.title: Trump says no one will control Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Donald Trump says he won’t allow Iran to control ⁠the Strait of ⁠Hormuz under the terms of any deal reached with Tehran.

item.title: Ghana welcomes first group fleeing South African anti-immigration protests
item.description: The repatriation came following a wave of anti-immigration protests in recent weeks.

item.title: Alabama pushes US Supreme Court to approve congressional map for midterms
item.description: Republicans have revived a push to implement a congressional map that was rejected in 2023 for racial discrimination.

item.title: Trump appears to threaten Oman over Strait of Hormuz impasse
item.description: The US president warns that Oman, a US ally, 'will behave just like everybody else, or we will have to blow them up'.

item.title: Can the US and India repair ties over trade and China?
item.description: Rubio's visit to India comes as Washington seeks closer ties with New Delhi amid trade tensions and energy politics.
